name: No Bake Cherry Yum Yum
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix melted margarine with graham cracker crumbs. Press half into a 9x13 inch dish.
2. Mix Dream Whip® according to directions. Add sugar, cream cheese, and mix until stiff peaks form.
3. Spread half of the whipped mixture over the crumbs in the dish.
4. Arrange 2 cans cherry pie filling over the whipped topping.
5. Cover with remaining whipped topping and top with remaining graham cracker crumbs.
6. Chill for 24 hours before serving.
Submitted to cookbook by Peggy Hamlet. Lori K recipelu 1-18-98.
